message:
Implement session state machine fixes per spec 2.3, 2.5, 2.8

WS2a: Transition to AWAITING_INPUT when model responds with a question
(text ending in ?) and no tool calls. Both AWAITING_INPUT and IDLE
accept ProcessInput calls.

WS2b: Set state to IDLE before returning MaxTurns error, preventing
stale PROCESSING state.

WS2c: Emit SESSION_END with reason "input_complete" after ProcessInput
returns successfully. Close() emits with reason "session_closed".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
